emergency_definition: Emergency if no power, burning smell, or sparking panel.
Emergency routing: call technician line 214-555-0133 first, then manager 214-555-0134.
Non-emergency work orders are collected and reviewed same day when possible.
Emergency calls must route first to 214-555-0134 and then 214-555-0133.
Non-emergency requests should be collected for next business day scheduling.

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Emergency calls must route first to 214-555-0134 and then 214-555-0133.

non_emergency_routing_rules.routing_summary: Non-emergency requests should be collected for next business day scheduling.

call_transfer_rules.transfer_fail_message: If transfer fails after 60 seconds, inform caller an electrician will call within 30 minutes.

integration_constraints: Do not create generator service jobs automatically in ServiceTrade.
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours, the agent confirms emergency status immediately. For emergencies, it captures name, number, and address before transfer. For non-emergencies, it logs details and confirms next-business-hours follow-up.
office_hours_flow_summary: During office hours (Monday-Friday 08:00 AM-05:00 PM CST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
notes: Generated from demo input: account_002_demo.txt | Updated with onboarding data
